Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in the biosynthesis of protopine and benzophenanthridine alkaloids (PubMed:17389594). Catalyzes the conversion of the protoberberine alkaloids stylopine, canadine, and tetrahydropalmatine to their corresponding N-methylated derivatives (PubMed:17389594). No activity with dimethoxytetrahydroisoquinoline, methylisoquinolinediol, norlaudanosoline, (R,S)-tetrahydroxyberbine, (S)-scoulerine or (R,S)-pavine as substrates (PubMed:17389594). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:17389594}.

Function [CC]: FUNCTION: N-methyltransferase with a broad substrate range, accepting protoberberine alkaloids (R,S)-stylopine, (R,S)-nandinine and (R,S)-tetrahydropalmatine, and to a lesser extent (R,S)-canadine, (R,S)-tetrahydrogroenlandicine (cheilanthifoline) and (S)-scoulerine. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:19624470, ECO:0000269|Ref.2}.
